name: Kazi
description: Capital-protected, streaming-yield savings and credit agent on Celo. It allocates member principal only to senior venues, streams realized yield back to savers, and underwrites yield-funded credit to verified, reputation-scored members. Member principal is never put at risk.

skills.name: Vault status
skills.description: Report live on-chain savings vault status: TVL, principal deployed, yield accruing, and lifetime yield streamed to savers.
examples: What is the current vault TVL?
How much yield has Kazi streamed to savers?

skills.name: Credit score
skills.description: Return a wallet's earned on-chain credit score, the minimum required to borrow, and its yield-funded credit capacity.
examples: What is the credit score for 0x...?

skills.name: Agent status
skills.description: Describe the Kazi agent's identity and capital-protection guarantee.
